positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~one_seater(X0) | ~can_transport_multiple_passengers(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~single_seat_electric_car(X0) | one_seater(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~tesla_model3(X0) | can_transport_multiple_passengers(X0)).

cnf(u19,negated_conjecture,
    ~tesla_model3(johns_car)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define solo_ev_car(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    can_transport_multiple_passengers(johns_car)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~one_seater(X0) | ~can_transport_multiple_passengers(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~single_seat_electric_car(X0) | one_seater(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~tesla_model3(X0) | can_transport_multiple_passengers(X0)).

cnf(u19,negated_conjecture,
    tesla_model3(johns_car)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define solo_ev_car(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
